raw_responses.title: AuditableLLM Hash-Chain-Backed Compliance-Aware Framework
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: decouples update execution from audit-verification layer; hash-chain backed tamper-evident audit trail for adaptation/update/unlearning workflows.

raw_responses.title: Tracing and Reversing Edits in LLMs (EditScope, 2025/05)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: derives edited object from edited weights with 88%+ accuracy; formalises tracing + reversing edits using only model weights.

raw_responses.title: EditMark Watermarking LLMs via Model Editing (2025/10)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: embeds watermarks via model editing; weight-based watermark for provenance.

raw_responses.title: LarQL SQL-like Query Language for LLM Weight Editing
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: SHOW patches command provides auditable record of every fact changed in a model.

raw_responses.title: Knowledge Editing for LLMs Survey (ACM Computing Surveys 2024)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: comprehensive survey of knowledge editing methods including ROME/MEMIT.

raw_responses.title: Benchmarking and Rethinking Knowledge Editing for LLMs
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: complex event-based KE benchmark; autoregressive inference.

raw_responses.title: Massive Editing via Dynamic Weight Generation (2025/12)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: dynamic weight generation for massive edits at scale.
